events.tbaDescription: Date to be announced. Subscribe to our newsletter to be the first to know when registration opens!
events.registerDescription: Secure your spot at {location}. Seats are limited and first come, first served.
events.registrationOpensSoon: Registration will open soon. Check back later!
events.rsvpClosedDescription: This event already happened. RSVPs are no longer available.
events.wrapUpTitle: That's a wrap. Thank you for joining us.
events.wrapUpDescription: We appreciate everyone who attended. If you have feedback, we'd love to hear from you.
events.speakerPreview: You can hear inspiring speakers like {names}.
events.noteFreeEntry: Entry is free. Just show up and grab a seat. We appreciate an RSVP so we can prepare.
events.noteFlexibleTimeline: We keep things loose. No strict schedule. We go with the flow.
